description: Style Note rasasi impresses and flatters your senses with their unique fragrances that last long and keep you smelling fresh. These are fragrances that will please the royals just as it would appeal to your more earthy senses. Each and every one of their perfumes are keepers. This perfume from Rasasi is for the gentlemen. Product Details Rasasi Blue is a men's perfume spray which has a fresh spicy, woody and and musky fragrance. The top notes are aromatic, mandarin, mint and citrus. The middle notes are pepper, geranium, coriander, rose and jasmine. Base notes are woody, amber and musky. The perfume is bottled in a frosted blue glass flask with a silver metallic cap shaped like a hat, the mark of a true gentleman. Size 100 ml
